teaser: A fresh, healthy Mexican fusion concept with a powerful social mission — for every meal sold, one is donated to someone in need through the Plate 4 Plate programme. Fully standardised operations mean no prior food experience is required.
highlights: Plate 4 Plate social mission — every meal sold donates a meal to someone in need
No prior food experience needed — fully standardised operations
Pioneer opportunity: 4–6 sites available in Greater Manchester & West Yorkshire
